note: 自动 curated 的 KOL / podcast 观点（源：AI Signal 中央 X + 播客 feed；规则打分生成）。展示 4 条、take 一句话；换下条目进入 kol_archive。

kol.take: agent 价值正在从一次性生成转向长期工作流；状态管理、成本归因、工具调用和反馈闭环会决定 token 消耗与产品粘性。
kol.take_en: Agent value is moving from one-shot generation to durable workflows; state, cost attribution, tool use and feedback loops drive token usage and stickiness.

kol.via: Invest Like the Best · Jeremy Giffon - The Billion Dollar PDF - [Invest Like...
kol.via_en: Invest Like the Best · Jeremy Giffon - The Billion Dollar PDF - [Invest Like...
kol.take: 算力竞争正在变成资本结构问题；GPU、数据中心、offtake 和融资成本共同决定哪些公司能参与 AI 扩张。
kol.take_en: AI compute is becoming a capital-structure problem: GPUs, datacenters, offtake and financing costs decide who can scale.

kol.take: 模型、数据集和研究工具会强化平台默认值；基础设施公司的 moat 正在从硬件延伸到研究与开发工作流。
kol.take_en: Models, datasets and research tools reinforce platform defaults; infrastructure moats are extending from hardware into research and developer workflows.

kol.take: 算力竞争正在变成资本结构问题；GPU、数据中心、offtake 和融资成本共同决定哪些公司能参与 AI 扩张。
kol.take_en: AI compute is becoming a capital-structure problem: GPUs, datacenters, offtake and financing costs decide who can scale.

kol_archive.via: Capital Allocators · Moat Investing Nuances – Pat Dorsey (EP.509)
kol_archive.via_en: Capital Allocators · Moat Investing Nuances – Pat Dorsey (EP.509)
kol_archive.take: AI 应用最终仍要回到 moat、定价权和再投资空间；只靠模型调用或短期增长，很难形成可持续变现。
kol_archive.take_en: AI apps still need moats, pricing power and reinvestment runway; model access and short-term growth alone rarely create durable monetization.

kol_archive.via: Alex Kantrowitz · OpenAI President Greg Brockman: Our Plan To Merge Chat...
kol_archive.via_en: Alex Kantrowitz · OpenAI President Greg Brockman: Our Plan To Merge Chat...

kol_archive.take_en: AI compute is becoming a capital-structure problem: GPUs, datacenters, offtake and financing costs decide who can scale.

kol_archive.via: X · Vercel AI Gateway token spend race
kol_archive.via_en: X · Vercel AI Gateway token spend race
kol_archive.take: Gateway 的 $ 流向比 benchmark 更真实：Anthropic 占优、open-weight 上升、Google 靠单位经济性是 quiet killer
kol_archive.take_en: Gateway $ flows beat benchmarks: Anthropic leads, open-weight rising, Google the quiet killer on unit economics

kol_archive.take: 2029 年 AI debt 存量或超 $7T；compute access 正在金融化，融资结构决定谁能参与竞争
kol_archive.take_en: AI debt may top $7T by 2029; compute access is financializing — capital structure decides who competes

kol_archive.via: X · Claude Code 起源叙事
kol_archive.take: 「we are 1% done」——Claude Code 从工具升级为公司级产品线，看生态与企业部署
kol_archive.take_en: "We are 1% done" — Claude Code graduates from tool to company-level product line

kol_archive.take: 数据中心节奏 vs 收入增速「错两年就是毁灭性的」；Claude Code 已成 enterprise 主导，coding agent 是 token 消耗的结构性主力
kol_archive.take_en: Datacenter timing vs revenue: "off by two years could be ruinous"; coding agents are the structural driver of token consumption

kol_archive.via: How I AI「从手机管理 autonomous coding agents」
kol_archive.via_en: How I AI — running autonomous coding agents from a phone
kol_archive.take: 用户角色从 agent prompter 变成 agent manager：Linear 做状态机、Symphony 管 agents、按任务追踪 token cost、云 VPS 扩容——agent workflow 越来越像生产系统，token 消耗与成本归因成为一等公民
kol_archive.take_en: The user's role shifts from agent prompter to agent manager: Linear as state machine, Symphony managing agents, per-task token cost tracking, cloud VPS for scale — agent workflows now resemble production systems, with token cost attribution a first-class concern

kol_archive.via: 对上述播客的逐段 recap（bull/bear 分歧点梳理）
kol_archive.via_en: Point-by-point recap of the above pod (bull/bear disagreements)
kol_archive.take: 适合快速抓要点：capex 周期、收入外推的分歧在哪、哪些论断值得打折
kol_archive.take_en: Fast way to extract the cruxes: where the capex-cycle and revenue-extrapolation disagreements sit, and which claims deserve a haircut

kol_archive.via: Sequoia AI Ascent（对谈 Stephanie Zhan）
kol_archive.take: AI 正在成为数字工作的新 operating layer：从 vibe coding 进入 agentic engineering，人类的角色变成指挥、监督与编排 agents
kol_archive.take_en: AI is becoming the new operating layer for digital work: from vibe coding to agentic engineering — humans direct, supervise and orchestrate agents

kol_archive.take: 「loopy era」：自主系统自己跑实验、训模型、调参；自 2025-12 起基本不再手写代码——对 token 结构的含义：agent 长任务 = 输出 token 与工具调用密度双升
kol_archive.take_en: The "loopy era": autonomous systems run their own experiments, training and tuning; he has barely hand-written code since Dec 2025 — implication for token mix: long agent tasks push both output tokens and tool-call density up

kol_archive.take: 模型商业化要看真实路由和 $ spend 份额，而不是只看 benchmark；渠道份额能更早暴露谁在生产流量里变现。
kol_archive.take_en: Model monetization is better tracked through real routing and $ spend share than benchmarks; channel share reveals who is monetizing production traffic.

kol_archive.who: Ben Horowitz’s Advice for New Graduates
kol_archive.via: a16z · Don’t Follow Your Passion | Ben Horowitz’s Advice for...
kol_archive.via_en: a16z · Don’t Follow Your Passion | Ben Horowitz’s Advice for...
kol_archive.take: 模型切换会越来越依赖团队自己的 eval；真实任务、人工偏好和失败模式比通用榜单更接近采购与路由决策。
kol_archive.take_en: Model switching will depend on team-specific evals; real tasks, human preferences and failure modes are closer to buying and routing decisions than generic leaderboards.
